---
title: "Contact"
draft: true
---

# Contact

::: {.section-intro}
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.
:::

::: {.contact-grid}

::: {.contact-card}
### Email
hello@compassionate-pathways.nz

Placeholder for preferred contact method.
:::

::: {.contact-card}
### Phone
021 000 0000

Placeholder business number.
:::

::: {.contact-card}
### Location
Christchurch / Online

Placeholder delivery note.
:::

:::

## Getting in touch

::: {.panel-soft}
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Placeholder response time: 1–2 business days.
:::

## Important note

::: {.notice-soft}
This is a placeholder note: if you or someone else is in immediate danger or crisis, please contact emergency services or a local crisis support line rather than using this form.
:::

::: {.cta-band}
## A gentle first step

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.

[Email Kris](mailto:hello@compassionate-pathways.nz){.btn-cp-primary}
:::
